title: Sorting of Items in Gantt View
excerpt: Hello, I am setting up a gantt view for a dashboard.  I want to preserve the sort order of items as they are ordered on the board.  It appears that the gantt view is re-ordering items based upon the date field that is ch…

posts.author: scottmorley (Scott Morley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am setting up a gantt view for a dashboard. I want to preserve the sort order of items as they are ordered on the board. It appears that the gantt view is re-ordering items based upon the date field that is chosen for the gantt view. How can I preserve the sort order of items as shown on the board? (I feel like I must be blind and missing the configuration option somewhere!)

Thanks, Scott

posts.author: nsharma (Nimisha Sharma)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I am facing the same issue. Has it been resolved?

posts.author: JustAnotherPM (Stuart Hooker)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have just run-into the same, baffling limitation. In our case this mixes separate releases for our programmes, the only workaround I can think of is using a separate column and then changing the Group By setting (we currently use Group, but this is used to separate each programme).

A sort feature should be added to the Gantt view which would allow you to select start date (or whichever criteria is relevant), with the default being the sequence of items on the Main Table.

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml: Same on my side, i would like to be able to oder the task by alphabetical order (instaed of date) in the Gantt, in order not to impact my Gantt if I modify a date.

posts.author: scottmorley (Scott Morley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joachim, can you provide an example of when your tasks would need to be statically sorted alphabetically by task name?

My original request is to have the Gantt view preserve the order in which the items are sorted on the board (presumably, the Gantt view would also preserve any sorting that is configured on the board).

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml:
scottmorley:

My original request is to have the Gantt view preserve the order in which the items are sorted on the board (presumably, the Gantt view would also preserve any sorting that is configured on the board).

Hi Scott, the tean here was using a Gantt, but it was frustrating for them because when they changed a date in the Gantt it was changing the order and they were lost (there is a lot of lines in my Gantt). To have the ability to choose the order, and sort in alphabetic order for exemple will be very useful in this case.
What would be great is to have the ability to choose the dysplay order: by date, by alphabetic order, in the original order (order it is display in the table)…

posts.author: BenH (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am surprised there are only 16 votes for this so far!
Yes Please: Make it possible to sort the gantt chart freely, same as we can sort table views!

posts.author: christinap (Christina Punchard)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m also surprised that this isn’t higher on the priority list - it’s vital! We need to sort our projects (viewed in Gantt) based on priority and it just doesn’t seem possible.

posts.author: JonathanUttley (Jonathan Uttley)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 for this, we want to sort our list on the left by created date on the board, without it having an effect on the planned dates in the Gantt.

Simply allowing us to sort the list on the left by created order in the board would solve this problem. Seems like a fairly standard feature!

posts.author: elaine.f_PM (Elaine Fennelly)
posts.cookedHtml: Also voting for this - please let us know if this feature gets released

posts.author: goolie (adam gould)
posts.cookedHtml: Crazy I can’t drag tasks in whatever order I want in Gantt chart.

posts.author: RossD (Ross Doak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone managed to sort his ?
I’ve got 14 projects on going and I can change the order or drag them into a order that I need to project plan

posts.author: AspenPM (Gary)
posts.cookedHtml: Madness this still only has 75 votes still 3 years later? How are people managing Gantt chart views into appropriate sequencing/sort orders?

posts.author: scottmorley (Scott Morley)
posts.cookedHtml: “Madness” – exactly! It seems that monday doesn’t bother reading feedback from their community. I’ve had to resort to posting JPG’s of gantt charts created in MSP

posts.author: KVelasco (Kristiaan)
posts.cookedHtml: 2025 and this function still has not been developed. Quite frustrating to manage a large portfolio of project boards.

posts.author: MathijsKok (mkok)
posts.cookedHtml: This is indeed a problem we are also facing. We need sorting of items and projects.

posts.author: thomasgaillard (Thomas Gaillard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, still no news about the feature ?
Thank you for considering companies with many projects (which pay for enterprise-type licenses..).
Thanks

posts.author: GanttGo (Hidai Bar-Mor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thomasgaillard @scottmorley @RossD ,

We recently launched GanttGo a marketplace app that solves the difficulties you bump into with the Gantt chart.

GanttGo does:

  • items stay in board order
  • Groups appear in the same sequence
  • Full PDF, PowerPoint and excel export too

Its available in the marketplace. Search for Ganttgo. Hope it helps!
